td.style: height:5px; padding:0; line-height:0; font-size:0; background:linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #2E7D32, #6BBF4E, #A8E063, #6BBF4E, #2E7D32, transparent);

div.style: font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size:0.8rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:#e8f5e9; line-height:1.2;
font-size:0.6rem; color:#778899; letter-spacing:1.5px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-top:2px;
position:relative; width:100%; height:100%; min-height:300px; overflow:hidden;

img.style: position:absolute; inset:0; width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; object-position:top center; z-index:2;

div.style: position:absolute; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; height:90px; z-index:3; background:linear-gradient(to top, rgba(6,14,8,0.95) 0%, transparent 100%);
position:absolute; bottom:10px; left:14px; right:14px; z-index:4;
font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:700; color:#fff; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1.5px; line-height:1.2;
font-family:'Exo 2',sans-serif; font-size:0.6rem; font-weight:700; color:#A8E063; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-top:2px;
position:absolute; top:0; right:-1px; bottom:0; width:20px; z-index:5; background:linear-gradient(to right, transparent 0%, rgba(107,191,78,0.15) 50%, rgba(6,14,8,0.8) 100%);

td.style: padding:7px 10px; background:rgba(107,191,78,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(107,191,78,0.12); border-radius:6px; width:50%;

div.style: font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:700; color:#e8f5e9; line-height:1.2;
font-size:0.55rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:#778899; margin-top:2px;

td.style: padding:7px 10px; background:rgba(107,191,78,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(107,191,78,0.12); border-radius:6px; width:50%;

div.style: font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:700; color:#e8f5e9; line-height:1.2;
font-size:0.55rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:#778899; margin-top:2px;

td.style: padding:7px 10px; background:rgba(107,191,78,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(107,191,78,0.12); border-radius:6px;

div.style: font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:700; color:#e8f5e9; line-height:1.2;
font-size:0.55rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:#778899; margin-top:2px;

td.style: padding:7px 10px; background:rgba(107,191,78,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(107,191,78,0.12); border-radius:6px;

div.style: font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:800; color:#A8E063; line-height:1.2;
font-size:0.55rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:#778899; margin-top:2px;

td.style: padding:7px 10px; background:rgba(107,191,78,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(107,191,78,0.12); border-radius:6px;

div.style: font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:700; color:#e8f5e9; line-height:1.2;
font-size:0.55rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:#778899; margin-top:2px;
margin-top:12px; border:1px solid rgba(107,191,78,0.35); border-radius:8px; overflow:hidden; background:rgba(107,191,78,0.04);

td.style: background:#030a04; padding:7px 20px; text-align:center; border-top:1px solid rgba(107,191,78,0.2);

span.style: color:#546E7A; font-family:'Exo 2',sans-serif; font-size:0.58rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase;

td.style: height:4px; padding:0; line-height:0; font-size:0; background:linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #2E7D32, #6BBF4E, #2E7D32, transparent);
